title: Chorr Police
subTitle: Anthony, a happy-go-lucky thief who lives in the slums of Mumbai, steals for the benefit of the underprivileged while constantly trying to outwit police officer Lovely Singh.

title: Krishna Aur Balram
subTitle: Brothers Krishna and Balram, who share a loving relationship, embark on a series of adventures together in Vrindavan while battling evil forces.

title: Super Bheem
subTitle: 1. Gooblepooch, an ever hungry alien, is brought to Dragonpur by Zor dragon. Before they could stop him from eating Super Bheem. 2. Bheem and Gang visit Lal Grah to get back Jwala's stolen gold chalice. They fool Ekankhis by hiding their identity.

title: Mighty Raju
subTitle: Mighty captures a thief using an invisible suit, impressing him with his intelligence.

title: Luv Kushh
subTitle: Luv and Kush, two endearing six-year-old twin brothers, live at Rishi Valmiki's ashram along with their mother, Sita, and have many adventures.
